blocked_packages.name: @types/vscode
blocked_packages.reason: Bumping @types/vscode forces engines.vscode up, cutting off fork editors (Cursor, Windsurf, etc.). Permanently blocked due to prior compatibility incident.

blocked_field_changes.reason: Changing engines.vscode breaks compatibility with fork editors that lag behind VS Code stable.

major_update_review.eslint_reason: ESLint ecosystem major updates require mutual compatibility verification.
major_update_review.default_reason: Major version updates may contain breaking changes. Manual review required.
